query: SELECT cs.id, cs.name, cs.ocppIdentity, e.id as evse_id, e.evseIdLocal, e.connectorId, e.connectorType, e.connector_status FROM charging_stations cs LEFT JOIN evses e ON e.stationId = cs.id ORDER BY cs.id, e.evseIdLocal;
